Success.verificationEmailSent: Verification link has been resent to your email.
Success.recoveryEmailSent: If an account exists for that email, a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox and spam folder.
Success.registrationUser: Registration successful. Please check your email for verification.
Success.securityProtocolInitialized: Security protocol initialized. Your permanent password is now active.
Success.passwordUpdated: Your password has been successfully updated. You can now log in with your new credentials.

Errors.tokenExpired: The token has expired. Please log in again.
Errors.invalidOrExpiredToken: The token is invalid or expired.
Errors.accountBanned: Your account has been blocked. Please contact support.
Errors.adminOnly: Access denied. This area is for administrative personnel only.
Errors.mustLoginAsAdmin: Admins must log in through the administrative console.
Errors.socialAccountFound: It looks like you previously signed up with {providers}. Please use that method to log in.
Errors.emailNotVerified: Email is not verified. Please check your email.
Errors.accountSuspended: Too many failed attempts. Account suspended for {minutes} minutes.
Errors.accountRemaining: Your account has been temporarily suspended due to too many failed login attempts. Please try again in {minutes} minutes.
Errors.incorrectPasswordAttempts: Incorrect email or password. Remaining attempts: {count}
Errors.twoFactorVerifyToken: User ID is missing in token
Errors.twoFactorSecretNotFound: 2FA secret not found. Please restart the setup process.
Errors.twoFactorInvalidVerificationCode: Invalid verification code. Please try again.
Errors.userAlreadyExists: User with this email already exists.
Errors.tooManyRequests: Please wait {seconds} seconds before sending a new request.
Errors.invalidResetLink: Invalid or expired password reset link.
Errors.requireInvitation: Registration on this domain requires an invitation.
Errors.invalidInvitation: Invalid, expired, or already used invitation.
Errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.description: We are currently building the notification system for your admin panel.
